name: The Bucket
author: Poki
description: In Bucket, you play as a mysterious flying fish that carries squirrels around in a bucket. Its up to you to safely navigate through caves and dodge obstacles to keep yourself floating and keep your bucket from falling. This classic Flash game is now back in HTML 5 so you can play it whenever you like! Can you bring all the squirrels safely to their destination? How to play Bucket? Click and drag around to move the fish! Who created Bucket? Bucket is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Fluffball and Rustyard How can I play Bucket for free? You can play Bucket for free on Poki. Can I play Bucket on mobile devices and desktop? Bucket can be played only on your computer.
